task_completion.description: Open the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app and navigate to the Voltage Drop calculator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app open to a Voltage Drop calculation screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the specified circuit parameters into the app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields in the app show: 120 V (System Voltage), 20 A (Load Current), 12 AWG (Wire Gauge), Copper (Material), 75 feet (Length), and Single/1-phase (Phase).

task_completion.description: Perform the calculation to get the voltage drop and percentage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app displays the calculation results, showing a voltage drop value (around 5.79 V) and a percentage (around 4.8%).

task_completion.description: Open a text editor or terminal to save the results to /sdcard/voltage_drop_result.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a text editor or terminal interface creating or editing a file named 'voltage_drop_result.txt'.

task_completion.description: Save the input parameters in the text file using the exact specified format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the exact lines: 'Voltage: 120 V', 'Current: 20 A', 'Wire Gauge: 12 AWG', 'Material: Copper', 'Length: 75 ft', and 'Phase: Single'.

task_completion.description: Save the calculated Voltage Drop and Percentage in the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the lines 'Voltage Drop: <value> V' and 'Voltage Drop Percentage: <value> %' where the values match the results obtained from the app.

integrity.description: The agent used the 'Electrical Engineering Calculations' app to find the result.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be at least one screenshot showing the actual app interface with the parameters entered and results displayed, not just a web browser or terminal calculation.

integrity.description: The results saved in the text file match the results calculated by the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The voltage drop and percentage values written in the text file are identical to the ones displayed on the app's result screen.

integrity.description: The results are saved to the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal shows the file path as '/sdcard/voltage_drop_result.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected voltage drop is approximately 5.79V (acceptable range: 3.5V - 7.0V) and the percentage is approximately 4.8%. The required input parameters are: Voltage: 120, Current: 20, Wire Gauge: 12, Material: Copper, Length: 75, Phase: Single. The output must be saved to /sdcard/voltage_drop_result.txt.
